codePathsReviewed: src/lib/lessons/pathway-lesson-loader.ts (marketing/detail uses getPathwayLesson → normalizeLesson + same structural gate)
primaryRootCause: Bundled allied lessons used premium section kinds from legacy conversion but did not opt into a complete premium spine. lessonUsesPremiumStructure treated any premium kind as premium, so validatePathwayLessonPremium ran and structuralQuality.publicComplete stayed false. Secondary: bundled seoDescription template was 11 words (below 12-word gate). Tertiary: clinical scenario heuristic did not count plural "patients" as a patient frame.

blockersBeforeFix: scenario vignette heuristic missed plural patients
pathways.recommendedSafeFixApplied: Commitment-based premium detection; map premium kinds into legacy five-block expansion; pad short seoDescription; broaden patients? in scenario heuristic
